steps.title: Find the new quantity
steps.content:
The price increases from $12$ dollars to $15$ dollars, an increase of $3$ dollars. Each $1$ dollar increase reduces sales by $8$ bottles, so sales decrease by
$$3(8)=24$$The estimated number sold is
$$96-24=72$$

steps.title: Compute the revenue
steps.content:
Revenue equals price times number sold:
$$15(72)=1{,}080$$The answer is C.
